Average annual homeownership costs beyond the mortgage: $21,400 (Bankrate). 42% of owners say hidden costs were their biggest regret. Pearl SCORE™'s Operations pillar shows what a home will cost to run — early.

Same price. Same square footage. Very different cost to own. HVAC, insulation, and water heater condition drive monthly costs — and they're invisible in listings. Pearl SCORE™ helps you compare before you commit.
